tasks.subject: Task 1: statsCache (TTL cache for stats JSON)
tasks.description:
Create backend/internal/api/stats_cache.go (statsCache mirroring binaryListCache, stores []byte, single-flight) + stats_cache_test.go (hit-within-TTL, recompute-after-expiry); wire newStatsCache(60*time.Second) in server.go. Verify: cd backend && go test ./internal/api/ -run TestStatsCache -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/api/stats_cache.go", "backend/internal/api/stats_cache_test.go", "backend/internal/api/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./internal/api/ -run TestStatsCache -v", "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Build Health aggregation endpoint
tasks.description:
store/stats.go (BuildHealthSnapshot, BuildOutcomesOverTime, TopFailingByRepoArch, PassRateByRepoArch via withScope) + stats_test.go; api/stats.go (buildHealthResponse, statsRange, buildHealthStatsHandler cached); register /stats/build-health in products/pr/releases route groups. Verify: cd backend && go test ./internal/store/ -run TestBuildHealth -v && go test ./internal/api/ -v.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/store/stats.go", "backend/internal/store/stats_test.go", "backend/internal/api/stats.go", "backend/internal/api/server.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && go test ./internal/store/ -run TestBuildHealth -v && go test ./internal/api/ -v", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ECharts wrapper + theme
tasks.description:
npm install echarts; create charts/echartsTheme.ts (CSS-var palette) + charts/EChart.vue (init/resize/dispose, re-theme on data-theme change). Verify: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/package.json", "frontend/src/components/charts/EChart.vue", "frontend/src/components/charts/echartsTheme.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm install && npm run build", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Statistics tab scaffolding
tasks.description:
App.vue mainTab+stats state+render; AppHeader Statistics pill; useUrlState tab=statistics + stats params; types/api.ts BuildHealthStats; StatisticsPanel.vue (selectors, placeholder section); useStatistics.ts. Verify: cd frontend && npm run build.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/App.vue", "frontend/src/components/AppHeader.vue", "frontend/src/composables/useUrlState.ts", "frontend/src/types/api.ts", "frontend/src/components/StatisticsPanel.vue", "frontend/src/composables/useStatistics.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Build Health section
tasks.description:
Create stats/BuildHealthSection.vue (stat cards + outcomes stacked area + top-failing stacked-by-repo·arch bar + pass-rate-by-repo·arch bar via EChart, loading/error/empty states); render it in StatisticsPanel replacing the placeholder. Verify: cd frontend && npm run build.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/stats/BuildHealthSection.vue", "frontend/src/components/StatisticsPanel.vue"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run build", "modelTier": "standard"}
```
